overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a circular Gothic council chamber with deep blue walls and tall arched stained-glass windows. Several robed figures sit around a large curved wooden table in a magical meeting hall, with one character eventually standing and walking toward the back of the room.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a majestic circular Gothic chamber with deep blue walls and golden architectural details. A large curved wooden table dominates the center, surrounded by robed figures seated in quiet discussion. Tall arched windows with intricate stained glass line the back wall beneath an ornate domed ceiling with a hanging chandelier.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular gothic council chamber with curved meeting table

events.description: seated character in dark robes stands up from the left side of the table and begins walking toward the back of the chamber

agents.ego_description: maintaining stationary position while observing the character's movement across the chamber

notable_agents.action: standing up from wooden chair and walking around the curved table toward the center-back of the room

segments.scene_description: The static scene continues with the chamber unchanged, but one of the robed figures stands from their seat on the left and walks deliberately around the curved table toward the back of the room. The character moves past the seated figures and positions themselves near the center-back of the chamber while the camera maintains its fixed perspective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static view of a majestic Gothic council chamber as a moment of quiet deliberation shifts into a focused movement. It begins with a wide perspective of the circular room, where deep blue walls and golden architectural details frame a large curved wooden table surrounded by seated robed figures. As the initial stillness persists, the scene transforms when one of the robed figures on the left stands and begins a deliberate walk around the perimeter of the table. The camera maintains its fixed position as the character moves past the other seated members, gradually shifting the focal point of the room. Finally, the figure comes to a halt near the center-back of the chamber, positioned beneath the ornate domed ceiling and the intricate stained-glass windows.
